depression.description: I've been feeling anxious about being vulnerable with Ivan again, even though I recognize that he's trying to improve. It's hard to let my guard down when I remember what happened.
Whenever Ivan touches me, I can't shake the fear that he might hurt me again. It makes me question if I can truly trust him, even when he seems sincere.
I often feel powerless in my relationship, like I'm just waiting for something bad to happen. It's exhausting to constantly feel on edge.
I worry that my efforts to rebuild trust with Ivan are futile. I can't help but think that I might never feel safe or loved again.

Delusion.description: I struggle with the belief that I'm unlovable and destined to be alone. It's hard to shake off the feeling that no one could truly care for me.
I feel like I have to be on high alert all the time to prevent being hurt again. It's like I can't relax because I'm always waiting for something bad to happen.
I find myself trying to control every aspect of my interactions with Ivan. I think if I can manage things, I might be able to protect myself from being hurt.
